title: VFX & Computational Intelligence
slogan: We don't just simulate — we engineer perception
description: Bridging Creative VFX with Custom Tooling & AI Solutions.

showreel.title: Team Showreel 2024
showreel.caption: A compilation of our latest work in feature films and high-end TVC.

team.name: RICHARD LIM
team.bio: Passionate FX Artist with over a decade of experience in the animation industry throughout the world. Driven by a love for creating immersive visual worlds, Richard has honed his craft at renowned studios such as Framestore, The Mill and Illumination. Skilled in Houdini, Richard is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of special effects and bringing imaginative concepts to life.

team.name: SOPHON SEANGKAEW
team.bio: Highly driven and accomplished FX Artist with over a decade of experience in the industry. Sophon has worked with top-tier studios such as Weta, MPC, BluEr, and Synapse and honed a deep passion for creating breathtaking visual effects. Throughout his career, Sophon has also excelled in leading and supervising large teams, driving complex projects to success and excellence with creativity and precision.

team.name: ANDREY PANFILOV
team.bio: With over 25 years of experience bridging the gap between hard science and high-end VFX, Andrey leads the team with a unique fusion of Physics and Computer Science expertise. A specialist in photorealistic liquid simulations and advanced VEX coding, he builds proprietary tools that guarantee creative control and procedural efficiency. Currently spearheading the team's integration of AI into the VFX pipeline, Andrey focuses on fine-tuning generative models and developing custom AI tools to revolutionize production workflows. Combining the precision of a scientist with the artistic eye of a veteran freelancer, he transforms complex visions into technically robust realities
